{{CargoRelic
|name=Text for You
|class_id=20856
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=This smartphone is like a vault of spicy secrets. Each text is a playful tease, filled with the thrill of forbidden whispers.
*Just remember to keep it hidden from your better half!
|fame=17
|art=14
|fth=13
|civ=16
|tech=30
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Per Hitman intercepted, Snail HP +10<br>Hitmen Intercepted: 40/40
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Per Hitman intercepted, Snail HP +20<br>Hitmen Intercepted: 40/40
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Per Hitman intercepted, Snail HP +30<br>Hitmen Intercepted: 40/40
|ss4=Snail ATK +30<br>Per Hitman intercepted, Snail HP +30<br>Hitmen Intercepted: 40/40
|ss7=Snail ATK +30<br>Per Hitman intercepted, Snail HP +30<br>Hitmen Intercepted: 40/40<br> (Awakened)
}}
